content.hint: 面试官要了解你的核心竞争力

blanks.answer: What do you think sets you apart from other candidates?
options: What do you think is your strength?
What do you think sets you apart from other candidates?
What is your unique selling point?

content.scenarioHint: 求职者需准备好回答如何突出自己的优势。
content.responseTemplate: 面试官问你：你觉得你和别人比有什么特别之处？

content.hint: 用具体能力+效果结构，避免空泛形容词

blanks.answer: balance technical precision with clear communication
options: am always the loudest in meetings
balance technical precision with clear communication
work better alone than in groups

content.situation: 在面试中，面试官希望你说明你如何为团队带来独特价值
content.speakerText: What unique strength do you bring to a team?
content.speakerTextCn: 你为团队带来什么独特的优势？
content.knowledgePoint: 优势表达：能力+影响结构
content.responseTemplate: I ______, which helps me collaborate effectively and drive results.

content.hint: 强调处理方式而非情绪，体现专业性

options: wait for someone else to figure it out

content.situation: 面试官问你如何应对挑战性任务
content.speakerText: How do you handle difficult or ambiguous tasks?
content.speakerTextCn: 你如何应对困难或模糊不清的任务？
content.knowledgePoint: 优势表达：方法论+结果导向
content.responseTemplate: I ______ by breaking problems into smaller steps and testing solutions early.

content.hint: 突出主动性与具体行动，避免被动表达

blanks.answer: took initiative to develop my presentation skills
options: waited for my boss to train me
took initiative to develop my presentation skills
hired a tutor to fix my weaknesses

content.situation: 面试官让你举例说明你如何持续提升自己
content.speakerText: Can you tell me about a time you improved a skill on your own?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能谈谈你如何自主提升某项技能吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 优势表达：主动性+学习行为
content.responseTemplate: I ______ by practicing daily and seeking feedback from peers.

content.hint: 表达个人职业品质的核心形容词，常用于强调责任心
content.template: I'm super ___—I never miss deadlines, even under pressure.

content.hint: 表示‘快速学会’的地道动词短语，常用于口语表达
content.template: I learn fast—I ___ up Python in a month for my last project.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配（pick up a skill）
